title: Neuroscience (English) Master Program Mission and Vision
content:
Neuroscience (English) Master Program Mission and Vision

Mission:

To provide for the increasing public interest and the demand of high quality researchers in Neuroscience and with the support of our expert academical stafff, our mission is to train future neuroscientists, who can design and conduct multidisciplinary scientific research, who can follow and interpret recent developments in the field and who are creative and ethical.

Vision:

Our vision to become a pioneering, respectable ve favored interdisciplinary program that can develop national and international collaborations.
